family: Stainless Steel Unthreaded Spacers, For M5 Screw Size, 8mm OD
cad_vs_spec_agreement: exact match -- CAD-measured dimensions corroborate manufacturer-confirmed spec table values

evidence_tier_summary.ID_5.3mm: manufacturer-confirmed (full product page spec table) + CAD-measured (radius 2.65mm peak)
evidence_tier_summary.unthreaded_plain_bore: manufacturer-confirmed (Mount Type: Unthreaded Hole, Shape: Round)
evidence_tier_summary.OD_vs_packet_ceiling: RISK -- packet states OD<=~7.5mm ideal, reject OD>=9mm. This part's OD=8mm sits between those thresholds: it clears the hard-reject line (Ø9.8 flange opening measured from idler CAD) by ~0.9mm radius margin, but exceeds the stated 'ideal' ceiling by 0.5mm. Idler bearing CAD (SHTF20S3M100-5) shows the 685ZZ end-face annulus spanning a continuous Ø6.9-9.5mm with no internal step delineating inner-race-contact-zone from shield-adjacent-zone in the simplified catalog mesh, so whether OD=8mm clears the rotating ZZ shield cannot be manufacturer-confirmed from available evidence -- classified INFERRED/CAD-measured-on-a-different-part, not confirmed.
